articles.title: Here’s What We Know About Trump’s Plan for Gaza
articles.abstract: It would end the war and secure the release of all hostages. Hamas would give up its arms and its power, while a transitional government is set up. Hamas has not agreed and the terms will be hard for it to swallow.
